channel.title: /net/ipv4 ipv4的处理部分 on 技术的路上奔跑
channel.description: Recent content in /net/ipv4 ipv4的处理部分 on 技术的路上奔跑

item.description: 一、ipv4收包后如何处理 # 1. ip层包入口 # 1// net/ipv4/ip_input.c 2/* 3* Deliver IP Packets to the higher protocol layers. 4*/ 5int ip_local_deliver(struct sk_buff *skb) { 6 /* 7* Reassemble IP fragments. 8*/ 9 struct net *net = dev_net(skb->dev); 10 11 // 判断是否为分片包，分片包就先处理分片 12 if (ip_is_fragment(ip_hdr(skb))) { 13 if (ip_defrag(net, skb, IP_DEFRAG_LOCAL_DELIVER)) 14 return 0; 15 } 16 17 // 分片处理完毕调用ip_local_deliver_finish() 18 return NF_HOOK(NFPROTO_IPV4, NF_INET_LOCAL_IN, 19 net, NULL, skb, skb->dev, NULL, 20 ip_local_deliver_finish); 21} 根据ip包内的协议处理具体的协议 1// net/ipv4/ip_input.
